This is a testharness.js-based test.
[PASS] Cache padding varies if loaded from network.
[PASS] Cache padding is stable if loaded from http cache.
[PASS] Cache padding varies with request method.
[PASS] Cache padding follows a response loaded from cache_storage.
[PASS] Cache padding propagates through a service worker respondWith().
[FAIL PASS] Code cache padding should be stable.
Harness: the test ran to completion.
